title: Considering a second child in DC? You may need a second job, too
abstract: By the third child's arrival, you might think parents have seen it all. But that's not the case for Jermaine and Brandi Walker. Well-versed in raising children, they have a new wrinkle to deal with: finding affordable child care in Washington, D.C. "[We were told] a good amount was $1,600 a month, and we don't have an extra $1,600 sitting around," Brandi Walker said. Micah, the newest Walker, was born a few months ago. The Walkers started...

abstract: WHO and Congolese authorities are proposing changes to how some Ebola patients are cared for, new guidelines show, after a patient's death challenged the accepted medical theory that survivors are immune to reinfection.

title: Playoff-bound Mayde Creek powers past Morton Ranch
abstract: Mayde Creek senior offensive lineman Curtis Stripling said he saw the talent as soon as junior high, when some of the current Rams won a district title. The Rams were already assured of their first playoff spot since 2008 entering Friday's season finale at Legacy Stadium. With that still sinking in, Mayde Creek completed its best regular season in a decade with a 47-27 win against rival Morton Ranch. "It's exciting," Mayde Creek coach Mike Rabe...
